videos.headline: Purdue defensive lineman Malik Langham recovers fumble in end zone for TD
videos.description: Purdue gets a touchdown as they sack the quarterback and the ball ends up in the end zone where Malik Langham recovers for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Purdue defensive lineman Malik Langham recovers fumble in end zone for TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Josh McCray finds the end zone for Illinois
videos.description: Josh McCray gets into the end zone from 7-yards out to give Illinois the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Josh McCray finds the end zone for Illinois) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Purdue's Dylan Downing runs over defender for TD
videos.description: Purdue takes the lead back as Dylan Downing barrels over a defender at the goal line for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Purdue’s Dylan Downing runs over defender for TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Mockobee scores the short TD
videos.description: Devin Mockobee cruises into end zone for 3-yard touchdown for Purdue.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devin Mockobee scores the short TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Deion Burks takes the end around for a Purdue TD
videos.description: Purdue breaks the game open and goes up 37-13 as Deion Burks takes the pitch pass for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Deion Burks takes the end around for a Purdue TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Patrick Bryant outmuscles defender for impressive Illinois TD
videos.description: Illinois pulls closer as receiver Patrick Bryant outmuscles the defensive back for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Patrick Bryant outmuscles defender for impressive Illinois TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
